text: My account got locked for no reason. No email no SMS. Had to contact support with Aadhaar 1234-5678-9012 to unlock. Took 3 days.

title: Bank account linking failed

title: Improving gradually
text: App has improved a lot in the last 6 months. UI is cleaner. Still needs work on speed during market hours though.
